title: Run marked as failed during execution
suggestion: Review agent execution logs to understand why the run was aborted

title: No Java source code generated
evidence: find . -name '*.java' returns no results; expected com.braziliansoccer.mcp package with Main class and data loaders
suggestion: Agent failed to generate implementation — check agent logs for errors during code generation

title: MCP server main class not implemented
evidence: pom.xml line 108 references com.braziliansoccer.mcp.BrazilianSoccerMcpServer but file does not exist
suggestion: Implement BrazilianSoccerMcpServer with MCP protocol initialization

title: Match data loading not implemented
evidence: No source code found; CSV loader classes missing for Brasileirao_Matches.csv, Brazilian_Cup_Matches.csv, Libertadores_Matches.csv, BR-Football-Dataset.csv, novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv
suggestion: Implement CSV parsing and in-memory indexing for all 5 match datasets

title: Player data loading not implemented
evidence: No source code; FIFA data loader missing for fifa_data.csv (18,207 players)
suggestion: Implement player data parsing and search/filter capabilities

title: Match query handlers not implemented
evidence: No handlers found for: search by team, date range, competition, or season
suggestion: Implement MCP tools for match queries with filtering

title: Team statistics queries not implemented
evidence: No statistics calculation code found; win/loss/draw records, goals for/against not calculable
suggestion: Implement team statistics aggregation from match data

title: Player query capability missing
evidence: No player search or filter implementation found
suggestion: Implement player search by name, nationality, club, and rating queries

title: Team name normalization not implemented
evidence: TASK.md §Data Quality Notes specifies need to handle 'Palmeiras-SP', 'Palmeiras', 'Sport Club Corinthians Paulista' variations

title: Date format handling not implemented
evidence: TASK.md specifies handling ISO (2023-09-24), Brazilian (29/03/2003), and timestamped formats
suggestion: Implement flexible date parsing for multiple formats

title: UTF-8 encoding support not verified
evidence: No source code to verify handling of Portuguese accents (São Paulo, Grêmio, etc.) and special characters
suggestion: Ensure all file I/O and string operations use UTF-8

title: BDD tests not implemented
evidence: pom.xml declares Cucumber dependencies but no .feature files or step definitions exist
suggestion: Create BDD scenarios (Feature: Match Queries, Feature: Team Statistics, etc.) with Cucumber steps

title: Performance criteria not testable
evidence: No code to measure response times; TASK.md requires <2s simple lookups, <5s aggregate queries
suggestion: Implement performance tests with timing assertions

title: Data coverage requirements not met
evidence: TASK.md §Data Coverage requires all 6 CSVs loadable and queryable; no code exists
suggestion: Verify all 6 CSV files can be loaded and queried: Brasileirao_Matches, Brazilian_Cup_Matches, Libertadores_Matches, BR-Football-Dataset, novo_campeonato_brasileiro, fifa_data

title: Sample questions (20+) cannot be answered
evidence: TASK.md lists 20+ example questions across match, team, player, competition, and statistical categories; no query handlers implemented
suggestion: Implement and test handlers for all example question types

title: Cross-file queries not implemented
evidence: No code for joining player and match data queries
suggestion: Implement queries that combine data from multiple CSV sources

title: Cannot build: no source files
evidence: mvn compile would fail — src/main/java is empty
suggestion: Generate Java source files before attempting build

title: Cannot run tests: no test code
evidence: src/test/java is empty; no Cucumber feature files or JUnit tests exist
suggestion: Generate test files and feature specifications
